moments.title: Commonwealth Games Glasgow 2026
moments.blurb: The XXII Commonwealth Games are underway in Glasgow, Scotland, featuring 3,000 athletes from 74 nations competing across 10 sports until August 2.

angles.name: General buzz
angles.copy: Glasgow is buzzing! The Commonwealth Games are in full swing, bringing together the best athletes from across the Commonwealth. What's been your favourite moment so far?

angles.name: Scottish focus
angles.copy: Our very own Glasgow is hosting the Commonwealth Games, with Day 2 bringing more gold medal events! Who are you cheering on today?

angles.name: Gold medal hunt
angles.copy: Another day, another chance for gold at the Commonwealth Games! With 14 gold medal events today, there's plenty of action to follow.

moments.title: Steelhouse Festival 2026
moments.blurb: The UK's highest outdoor rock festival, Steelhouse, continues today in Wales, running until Sunday, July 26.

angles.name: Rocking today
angles.copy: Steelhouse Festival is roaring on in Wales! If you're there, let us know who's been the standout act so far on the mountain!

angles.name: Welsh festival vibe
angles.copy: The hills are alive with the sound of rock! Steelhouse Festival continues today, bringing huge names and incredible energy to Wales. Are you soaking it all in?

moments.title: Latitude Festival 2026 Closes
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, celebrating its 20th anniversary with music, arts, and comedy at Henham Park, Suffolk, concludes today, July 26.

angles.name: Festival wrap-up
angles.copy: It's the final day of Latitude Festival! What an incredible 20th anniversary it's been in Henham Park. Share your favourite memories!

angles.name: Post-festival blues
angles.copy: The tents are coming down, the glitter is fading... Latitude Festival wraps up today. Who's already planning for next year?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Chart
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds the number one spot on the Official UK Singles Chart for the week of July 16-22, 2026.

angles.name: Number 1 shout out
angles.copy: Still at Number 1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are holding strong with 'Rein Me In' on the Official UK Singles Chart. Love to hear it!

angles.name: Chart rundown
angles.copy: Your Official UK Number 1 is still 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender & Olivia Dean! What other tracks are you loving in the Top 10?

moments.title: T100 Triathlon London
moments.blurb: The T100 Triathlon World Tour comes to London this weekend, with races taking place on Saturday, July 25 and Sunday, July 26, 2026.

angles.name: London sporting event
angles.copy: Get ready for some elite endurance action! The T100 Triathlon hits London this weekend, bringing top athletes to the capital. Who's heading out to watch?

angles.name: Weekend plans
angles.copy: If you're in London this weekend, the T100 Triathlon is bringing world-class competition to the city. A great way to get inspired!

moments.title: Mick Jagger's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The iconic Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Rock legend birthday
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger! Still got the moves and the music. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Iconic performer
angles.copy: 83 years young! Celebrating the incredible Mick Jagger on his birthday this Sunday. A true rock 'n' roll icon!

moments.title: Roger Taylor's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen drummer Roger Taylor celebrates his 77th birthday on Sunday, July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Drummer birthday
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the incredible Roger Taylor of Queen, who turns 77 this Sunday! What's your top Queen song?

angles.name: Queen's beat
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the legendary Queen drummer, Roger Taylor! The man behind some of rock's most iconic beats.

moments.title: Stormzy's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Grime superstar Stormzy celebrates his 33rd birthday on Sunday, July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Grime birthday
angles.copy: Big ups to Stormzy celebrating his 33rd birthday this Sunday! What's your favourite track from the king of grime?

angles.name: Music star birthday
angles.copy: Happy 33rd to the one and only Stormzy! Always bringing the fire. Drop your favourite Stormzy lyric below!

moments.title: AIG Women's Open
moments.blurb: The AIG Women's Open, one of golf's five major championships, takes place from July 29 to August 2, 2026, at Royal Lytham & St Annes in England.

angles.name: Major golf
angles.copy: Get ready for world-class golf! The AIG Women's Open tees off next Wednesday at Royal Lytham & St Annes. Who are your picks for the trophy?

angles.name: Sporting highlight
angles.copy: One of golf's biggest events, the AIG Women's Open, starts next week in England. Don't miss the action from July 29 to August 2!

moments.title: Kate Bush's 68th Birthday
moments.blurb: The enigmatic and influential artist Kate Bush celebrates her 68th birthday on Thursday, July 30, 2026.

angles.name: Unique artist birthday
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to the truly unique and visionary Kate Bush! Her music continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Kate Bush song?

angles.name: Musical genius
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible artistry of Kate Bush on her 68th birthday! Running Up That Hill, and into another year!

moments.title: Fatboy Slim's 63rd Birthday
moments.blurb: DJ and electronic music pioneer Fatboy Slim (Quentin Leo Cook) turns 63 on Friday, July 31, 2026.

angles.name: Dance legend birthday
angles.copy: Praise You! It's Fatboy Slim's 63rd birthday this Friday! Get ready to dance and celebrate the electronic music icon.

angles.name: 90s icon
angles.copy: Happy 63rd Birthday to the one and only Fatboy Slim! Still rocking the dancefloors worldwide. What's your go-to track?

moments.title: Will Champion's 48th Birthday
moments.blurb: Coldplay drummer Will Champion celebrates his 48th birthday on Friday, July 31, 2026.

angles.name: Coldplay birthday
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to Coldplay's brilliant drummer, Will Champion! What's your favourite Coldplay anthem?

angles.name: Band member appreciation
angles.copy: Celebrating Will Champion, the rhythmic backbone of Coldplay, on his 48th birthday this Friday! What a career!

moments.title: Wilderness Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Wilderness Festival returns to Cornbury Park, Oxfordshire, from July 30 to August 2, 2026, promising a diverse lineup of music, arts, and food.

angles.name: Festival anticipation
angles.copy: Wilderness Festival kicks off next Thursday! Get ready for a magical weekend of music, theatre, and wellness in Oxfordshire.

angles.name: Summer festival vibes
angles.copy: Next week, Wilderness Festival brings its unique blend of culture to Cornbury Park. Who's excited for the ultimate summer escape?

moments.title: Camp Bestival Dorset Begins
moments.blurb: The family-friendly Camp Bestival Dorset starts on July 30 and runs until August 2, 2026, at Lulworth Castle, featuring acts like Bastille and Fatboy Slim.

angles.name: Family festival fun
angles.copy: Camp Bestival Dorset is almost here! From next Thursday, Lulworth Castle will be alive with music and family fun. Who are you taking?

angles.name: Lineup excitement
angles.copy: Bastille, Fatboy Slim, Billy Ocean... Camp Bestival Dorset has a massive lineup starting next week! Get ready for a party!

moments.title: UK Summer School Holidays Continue
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays are in full swing across the UK, with most schools in England and Wales having broken up on July 20 and continuing until late August or early September.

angles.name: Holiday vibe check
angles.copy: Summer holidays are well underway across the UK! What's everyone getting up to? Beach days, staycations, or adventures abroad?

angles.name: Local summer plans
angles.copy: Schools out for summer in Wales! With the holidays in full swing, what local gems are you exploring with the family?

angles.name: Devon summer
angles.copy: Devon, it's peak summer holiday season! Are you hitting the beaches, exploring the moors, or finding fun closer to home?
